name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-1
title: item-status.py: add field-update subcommand for open items
description:
item-status.py only supports open/close transitions. Any field edit (priority, title, description) on an open item requires manually entering the worktree and editing item.json directly — bypassing audit trail.

Required: a new subcommand (e.g. 'item-status.py update') that:
- Accepts --field <name> --value <new-value> --reason <why>
- Works only on open items (closed items are immutable except via reopen)
- Appends a history entry with ts, actor, action=updated, field, old_value, new_value, reason
- Supports at minimum: priority, title, description
- Rejects unknown fields with a clear error

All field mutations must go through this path — no direct item.json edits allowed.

history.note: TDD cycle complete. item-status.py update subcommand added with full audit trail.
